message:
feat(web): add session middleware with pluggable backends (asupersync-1ccvr)

SessionStore trait, MemoryStore backend, SessionLayer builder,
SessionMiddleware (Handler impl), Session handle via typed extensions.
Cookie-based ID management with configurable attributes.
Also fix scan.rs closure type annotations from d6ea4b88. 28 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
